## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1) {#trm1.3.-adherence-to-atfm-slots-pi1 .Heading-2-TZ}

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 95.2%, very close to 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 95.5%. There was a minor difference between Geneva (93.3%) and Zurich (96.4%).

With regard to the 4.8% of flights that did not adhere, 3.4% were early and 1.4% were late.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
